title: A Logoff
text: A Logoff Log off (terminate session). Modes None. Conditions There is a current logon path. All tables for the current logon path are closed. Description This request logs off from the DBMS for the current logon path. If the DBMS supports a transaction mechanism, it rolls back the transaction on the current logon path and updates the number of open files. Refer to: Uniface Database I/O Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
